introSection: Phoenix Rising is an inverted roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Tampa in Tampa, Florida, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was announced on October 2, 2023.

Pieces of track arrived at the park in January 2024.

The ride opened on July 21, 2024, with previews for passholders and media members starting several days earlier.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains have on-board audio, with four distinct thematic options, each representing a different phoenix: fire, ice, jungle, and sea.

fullText:
Phoenix Rising is an inverted roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Tampa in Tampa, Florida, USA.

The ride was announced on October 2, 2023.

Pieces of track arrived at the park in January 2024.

The ride opened on July 21, 2024, with previews for passholders and media members starting several days earlier.



The trains have on-board audio, with four distinct thematic options, each representing a different phoenix: fire, ice, jungle, and sea.
